scripts.build: tsc -b && vite build && SEO_MAX_ENDED_STUBS=0 SEO_MAX_EVENT_PAGES_PER_METRO=600 SEO_PRIORITY_UNTIL=2026-07-05 node scripts/generate-seo-pages.mjs
scripts.ingest:events: node scripts/ingest-events.mjs && node scripts/generate-featured-plans.mjs && node scripts/build-coverage-summary.mjs
scripts.ingest:events:all: node scripts/ingest-events-all.mjs; rc=$?; node scripts/build-coverage-summary.mjs; exit $rc
scripts.ingest:metros: npm run ingest:spots:all && npm run ingest:events:all
scripts.deploy:data: npm run build:data-site && npx wrangler pages deploy data-site/dist --project-name=famhop-data --branch=main --commit-dirty=true
scripts.deploy:kids: npm run build && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=saturday-spots --branch=main --commit-dirty=true
scripts.build:adults: vite build --mode adults && SEO_MAX_ENDED_STUBS=0 node scripts/generate-seo-pages.mjs --mode adults && node scripts/apply-mosey-icons.mjs
scripts.deploy:adults: npm run build:adults && npx wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=nighthop --branch=main --commit-dirty=true
scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:planner
scripts.ci: npm run test && npm run validate:data:all && npm run validate:events:all && npm run build && npm run seo:i18n-check && npm run seo:audit && npm run ci:worker
